option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<BorderPane fx:id="mainPane" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fx:controller="cr.ac.ucr.sga.controller.MainController">
<top> <VBox spacing="10" styleClass="header"> <padding> <Insets top="15" right="15" bottom="15" left="15"/> </padding>
<Label text="Sistema de Gestión Académica" styleClass="title"/>
<HBox spacing="10"> <Button text="Expediente Académico" onAction="#showStudentView"/> <Button text="Atrás" onAction="#goBack"/> <Button text="Adelante" onAction="#goForward"/> <Button text="Acerca de" onAction="#showAbout"/> </HBox>
<Label fx:id="lblCurrentView" text="Vista actual: Menú principal"/> </VBox> </top>
</BorderPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<BorderPane fx:id="mainPane" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fx:controller="cr.ac.ucr.sga.controller.MainController" styleClass="root-pane" stylesheets="@../css/styless.css">
<!-- HEADER similar to the provided design --> <top> <VBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" prefHeight="70.0" styleClass="header-bar" BorderPane.alignment="CENTER"> <padding><Insets bottom="12.0" left="28.0" right="28.0" top="12.0"/></padding> <children> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="12.0"> <children> <Label styleClass="header-badge" text="PG-21"/> <Label styleClass="header-title" text="Sistema de Gestión Académica"> </Label> </children> </HBox> <Label fx:id="lblCurrentView" styleClass="header-sub" text="Vista actual: Menú principal"/> </children> </VBox> </top>
</BorderPane>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableColumn?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableView?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.GridPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="15" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fx:controller="cr.ac.ucr.sga.controller.StudentController">
<padding> <Insets top="15" right="15" bottom="15" left="15"/> </padding>
<Label text="Expediente Académico" styleClass="subtitle"/>
<GridPane hgap="10" vgap="10"> <Label text="Código:" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="0"/> <TextField fx:id="txtCode" promptText="Ej: IF3001" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="1"/>
<Label text="Curso:" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="2"/> <TextField fx:id="txtName" promptText="Nombre del curso" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="3"/>
<Label text="Créditos:" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="0"/> <TextField fx:id="txtCredits" promptText="Ej: 4" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="1"/>
<Label text="Nota:" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="2"/> <TextField fx:id="txtGrade" promptText="0 - 100" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="3"/>
<Label text="Periodo:" GridPane.rowIndex="2" GridPane.columnIndex="0"/> <ComboBox fx:id="cbPeriod" GridPane.rowIndex="2" GridPane.columnIndex="1"/>
<Label text="Estado:" GridPane.rowIndex="2" GridPane.columnIndex="2"/> <ComboBox fx:id="cbStatus" GridPane.rowIndex="2" GridPane.columnIndex="3"/> </GridPane>
<HBox spacing="10"> <Button text="Agregar curso" onAction="#addCourse"/> <Button text="Eliminar seleccionado" onAction="#deleteSelectedCourse"/> <Button text="Cargar 3 cursos de demostración" onAction="#addDemoCourses"/> </HBox>
<TableView fx:id="tableRecord" prefHeight="350"> <columns> <TableColumn fx:id="colCode" text="Código" prefWidth="100"/> <TableColumn fx:id="colName" text="Curso" prefWidth="280"/> <TableColumn fx:id="colPeriod" text="Periodo" prefWidth="100"/> <TableColumn fx:id="colCredits" text="Créditos" prefWidth="100"/> <TableColumn fx:id="colGrade" text="Nota" prefWidth="100"/> <TableColumn fx:id="colStatus" text="Estado" prefWidth="120"/> </columns> </TableView>
</VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableColumn?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableView?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.GridPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="15" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fx:controller="cr.ac.ucr.sga.controller.StudentController" styleClass="panel" stylesheets="@../css/styless.css">
<padding> <Insets top="15" right="15" bottom="15" left="15"/> </padding>
<Label text="Expediente Académico" styleClass="panel-title"/>
<GridPane hgap="10" vgap="10"> <Label text="Código:" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="0"/> <TextField fx:id="txtCode" promptText="Ej: IF3001" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="1"/>
<Label text="Curso:" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="2"/> <TextField fx:id="txtName" promptText="Nombre del curso" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="3"/>
<Label text="Créditos:" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="0"/> <TextField fx:id="txtCredits" promptText="Ej: 4" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="1"/>
<Label text="Nota:" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="2"/> <TextField fx:id="txtGrade" promptText="0 - 100" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="3"/>
<Label text="Periodo:" GridPane.rowIndex="2" GridPane.columnIndex="0"/> <ComboBox fx:id="cbPeriod" GridPane.rowIndex="2" GridPane.columnIndex="1"/>
<Label text="Estado:" GridPane.rowIndex="2" GridPane.columnIndex="2"/> <ComboBox fx:id="cbStatus" GridPane.rowIndex="2" GridPane.columnIndex="3"/> </GridPane>
<HBox spacing="10"> <Button text="Agregar curso" styleClass="btn-primary" onAction="#addCourse"/> <Button text="Eliminar seleccionado" styleClass="btn-green" onAction="#deleteSelectedCourse"/> <Button text="Cargar 3 cursos de demostración" styleClass="btn-ghost" onAction="#addDemoCourses"/> </HBox>
<TableView fx:id="tableRecord" prefHeight="350" styleClass="table-view"> <columns> <TableColumn fx:id="colCode" text="Código" prefWidth="100"/> <TableColumn fx:id="colName" text="Curso" prefWidth="280"/> <TableColumn fx:id="colPeriod" text="Periodo" prefWidth="100"/> <TableColumn fx:id="colCredits" text="Créditos" prefWidth="100"/> <TableColumn fx:id="colGrade" text="Nota" prefWidth="100"/> <TableColumn fx:id="colStatus" text="Estado" prefWidth="120"/> </columns> <placeholder> <Label text="No hay registros"/> </placeholder> </TableView>
</VBox>
